title: fab install — three-end propagation (Claude thin shell + Codex managed block + Cursor .mdc)
description: Replace the single addFabricKnowledgeBaseSection writer with three per-client thin-shell propagation writers. Each consumes the L1 snapshot (.fabric/AGENTS.md) + optional .fabric/project-rules.md as input and writes the appropriate output for its client: Claude CLAUDE.md thin-shell (real @import directives, no managed block content), Codex root AGENTS.md managed block (byte copy of snapshot + `\n---\n` + project-rules.md if exists), Cursor .cursor/rules/fabric-bootstrap.mdc managed block + YAML front-matter. Includes migration from legacy single-file `.cursor/rules` path to directory rule (clean-slate, no compat shim).

files.change: Replace FABRIC_SECTION_BEGIN_MARKER / FABRIC_SECTION_END_MARKER / FABRIC_SECTION_REGEX with re-exports from @fenglimg/fabric-shared (BOOTSTRAP_MARKER_BEGIN, BOOTSTRAP_MARKER_END, BOOTSTRAP_REGEX from TASK-01). DELETE SECTION_TARGETS const. DELETE buildFabricKnowledgeBaseSection (L291-L304) — content source is now the L1 snapshot.

DELETE addFabricKnowledgeBaseSection. Add three new exports: `writeClaudeBootstrapThinShell(targetRoot)`, `writeCodexBootstrapManagedBlock(targetRoot)`, `writeCursorBootstrapManagedBlock(targetRoot)`. Each is atomic, idempotent (byte-compare-skip), and best-effort. Also export shared helper `buildManagedBlockBody(targetRoot): string` = readFileSync('.fabric/AGENTS.md', 'utf8') + (project-rules.md exists ? '\n---\n' + readFileSync(...) : '').

Write CLAUDE.md with header (e.g. '# Project Knowledge') + idempotent line `@.fabric/AGENTS.md` (line-level idempotent add — appended if missing, preserved if present) + optional `@.fabric/project-rules.md` line IFF project-rules.md exists. No managed block (Claude consumes via @import). Preserve any user content outside these managed import lines.

Write root AGENTS.md: locate-or-append managed block with BOOTSTRAP_MARKER_BEGIN/END containing buildManagedBlockBody(targetRoot). In-place replace via BOOTSTRAP_REGEX if marker present; append with blank-line separator otherwise. Preserve user content outside markers verbatim (existing FABRIC_SECTION_REGEX state-machine pattern).

Write `.cursor/rules/fabric-bootstrap.mdc` (mkdirp `.cursor/rules/` directory): YAML front-matter (`---
alwaysApply: true
description: Fabric Protocol bootstrap rules
---

`) BEFORE managed block. Managed block contains buildManagedBlockBody. Clean-slate: if legacy single-file `.cursor/rules` exists with old `fabric:knowledge-base` marker, delete it (per memory `feedback_clean_slate.md` and user clarification decision 2 — no migration shim).

files.target: L1043 (replaces stale section step + integrates with TASK-02 snapshot step)
files.change: After the writeFabricAgentsSnapshot step from TASK-02, add three sequential best-effort steps: `runBestEffort('bootstrap-claude', () => writeClaudeBootstrapThinShell(plan.target))`, `runBestEffort('bootstrap-codex', () => writeCodexBootstrapManagedBlock(plan.target))`, `runBestEffort('bootstrap-cursor', () => writeCursorBootstrapManagedBlock(plan.target))`. Remove the now-deleted addFabricKnowledgeBaseSection import and call. Also DELETE AGENTS_MD_DEFAULT_CONTENT (L259-L267) and the scaffold-stage AGENTS.md write at L724-L732 — root AGENTS.md ownership moves entirely to bootstrap-stage (per install-flow exploration clarification recommended option 1).
Mirror the install.ts change — invoke the three thin-shell writers in the same order, each wrapped in runStep. Remove the addFabricKnowledgeBaseSection import.

Rename to `stripFabricBootstrapBlocks`. Strip BOOTSTRAP_REGEX (new marker) from BOTH root AGENTS.md and `.cursor/rules/fabric-bootstrap.mdc`. Remove `@.fabric/AGENTS.md` and `@.fabric/project-rules.md` line(s) from CLAUDE.md (managed-line strip). Delete `.cursor/rules/fabric-bootstrap.mdc` file if managed block is the only content beyond front-matter.
Add labels for `bootstrap-claude`, `bootstrap-codex`, `bootstrap-cursor` steps. Remove the obsolete `section` step label.
Mirror en.ts changes — add three new step labels in zh-CN; remove `section`.

implementation: Re-export marker constants from shared (TASK-01) in skills-and-hooks.ts; delete the local definitions
Delete buildFabricKnowledgeBaseSection (content lives in canonical now)
Implement buildManagedBlockBody helper that concatenates .fabric/AGENTS.md + optional `\n---\n` + .fabric/project-rules.md
Implement writeClaudeBootstrapThinShell — idempotent @-import line append (NOT managed block) + clean-slate strip of legacy fabric:knowledge-base markers if found in CLAUDE.md
Implement writeCodexBootstrapManagedBlock — in-place managed-block replace via BOOTSTRAP_REGEX state machine on root AGENTS.md
Implement writeCursorBootstrapManagedBlock — YAML front-matter + managed block in .cursor/rules/fabric-bootstrap.mdc; delete legacy .cursor/rules flat file if it exists
Wire all three writers into install.ts bootstrap-stage (after TASK-02 snapshot step)
Update uninstall to strip new marker from all three targets + delete legacy paths
Delete AGENTS_MD_DEFAULT_CONTENT + scaffold-stage AGENTS.md write (ownership consolidated to bootstrap-stage)
Add i18n keys for new step labels in both locales; remove obsolete `section` key

reference.pattern: Existing addFabricKnowledgeBaseSection state machine (skills-and-hooks.ts:638-705) — match region, slice before/after, reconcat. Carries over verbatim, just split per-client.
reference.examples: Cursor front-matter pattern from orphaned cursor-fabric-bootstrap.mdc L1-L4 (will be deleted in TASK-06 but pattern is the canonical reference)

criteria: After install on a clean fixture: CLAUDE.md exists with `@.fabric/AGENTS.md` line present (when project-rules.md absent) — verified via readFileSync regex match
After install: root AGENTS.md contains exactly ONE BOOTSTRAP_MARKER_BEGIN and exactly ONE BOOTSTRAP_MARKER_END (regex count === 1)
After install: `.cursor/rules/fabric-bootstrap.mdc` exists with `alwaysApply: true` in front-matter AND exactly one managed-block pair
Codex managed block body byte-equals `.fabric/AGENTS.md` content (when project-rules.md absent) or `<.fabric/AGENTS.md>\n---\n<.fabric/project-rules.md>` (when present)
Cursor managed block body byte-equals same content as Codex managed block
Pre-existing user content outside markers preserved verbatim across install runs (managed-section invariant)
Second install is byte-identical to first install (idempotency) across all three target files
If legacy `.cursor/rules` flat file exists, it is deleted (no migration shim per clean-slate)
Uninstall strips managed blocks from AGENTS.md + .cursor/rules/fabric-bootstrap.mdc AND removes @-import lines from CLAUDE.md
AGENTS_MD_DEFAULT_CONTENT constant is deleted from install.ts; scaffold-stage no longer writes root AGENTS.md
i18n keys `cli.install.steps.bootstrap-claude`, `cli.install.steps.bootstrap-codex`, `cli.install.steps.bootstrap-cursor` exist in both en.ts and zh-CN.ts

rationale.chosen_approach: Three per-client writers each with distinct write strategy reflecting how each client actually consumes the bootstrap: Claude=real @import, Codex=byte-copy managed block (no @import support), Cursor=byte-copy managed block + front-matter (no @import support). Mirrors the locked decision 3 from the task brief.
alternatives_considered: Single generic writer with per-target descriptors (loses clarity, hard to add Cursor front-matter as a special case)
Keep addFabricKnowledgeBaseSection signature and feed it three different content builders (would re-introduce the inline content builder issue)
decision_factors: Each client's consumption model is different
rationale.tradeoffs: More functions vs single generic. Acceptable; each function is small and clearly scoped.

manual_checks: Install on tmpdir fixture, verify all three target files written with new marker (fabric:bootstrap)
Pre-seed user content outside markers, install, verify preservation
Pre-seed legacy `.cursor/rules` flat file, install, verify it's deleted and new `.cursor/rules/fabric-bootstrap.mdc` created
Create .fabric/project-rules.md, install, verify both Codex and Cursor managed blocks contain the concat with `\n---\n` separator
success_metrics: Exactly one fabric:bootstrap marker pair per managed target file
Legacy fabric:knowledge-base markers absent from all three new outputs
integration: Covered by TASK-08 'three-end propagation matrix' test

risks.description: Cursor front-matter ordering — managed block must come AFTER front-matter or Cursor won't parse the rule
risks.mitigation: Test fixture asserts front-matter `---` ends before BOOTSTRAP_MARKER_BEGIN; integration test verifies file order

risks.description: Claude @-import line placement — if user has existing CLAUDE.md with no fabric content, idempotent append must not duplicate on re-runs
risks.mitigation: Use line-level grep before append: skip if line already present anywhere in file (managed-line idempotent add)

risks.description: Removing AGENTS_MD_DEFAULT_CONTENT + scaffold-stage write may break init-guard tests that pre-seed legacy state
risks.mitigation: Search packages/cli/__tests__/integration/init-guard.test.ts for AGENTS_MD_DEFAULT_CONTENT refs; update test expectations to reflect bootstrap-stage ownership

key_functions.purpose: Build the byte content for managed blocks: snapshot + optional concat with project-rules.md
key_functions.returns: string (snapshot content, or snapshot + '\n---\n' + project-rules content)

key_functions.purpose: Managed block in-place replace/append in root AGENTS.md
Front-matter + managed block write to .cursor/rules/fabric-bootstrap.mdc; clean-slate delete of legacy .cursor/rules flat file
